mapper.sql: id, title, content, area, employee_id, employee_name, repair_id, repair_name, status, create_time, receive_time, complete_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into t_repair (id, title, content, area, employee_id, employee_name, repair_id, repair_name, status, create_time, receive_time, complete_time, update_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{area,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{repairId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{repairName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{receiveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{completeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into t_repair
id, title, content, area, employee_id, employee_name, repair_id, repair_name, status, create_time, receive_time, complete_time, update_time,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{area,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{repairId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{repairName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{receiveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{completeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update: update t_repair set title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, area = #{area,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, employee_name = #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, repair_id = #{repairId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, repair_name = #{repairName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, receive_time = #{receiveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, complete_time = #{completeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select count(*) from t_repair where status = 0
select count(*) from t_repair where UNIX_TIMESTAMP(create_time) * 1000 > #{timestamp}
